seoTitle: Westwood vs Wetherill Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Westwood and Wetherill Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Westwood vs Wetherill Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Westwood and Wetherill Park.
heading: Westwood vs Wetherill Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Westwood, New South Wales and Wetherill Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Westwood has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wetherill Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Westwood or Wetherill Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Westwood has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Wetherill Park scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Westwood scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Wetherill Park scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Westwood or Wetherill Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Westwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
